implementation.layoutRule: Home keeps placement size and anchor from the base catalog item; only the rendered stage visual changes.

assetRules.style: premium soft 2D/2.5D cozy miniature garden object
assetRules.negative: no hard pixel sprite, no emoji icon, no text, no frame, no background scene
assetRules.anchor: same canvas, same ground contact shadow, same base footprint within one preset

stages.prompt: Tiny terracotta pot with warm soil and one barely visible green sprout, soft 2D/2.5D cozy garden prop, transparent background.
Same terracotta pot with two small rounded leaves, gentle painterly highlight, warm contact shadow, transparent background.
Same terracotta pot with fuller rounded green leaves, readable small silhouette, cozy mobile game prop, transparent background.
Same terracotta pot fully blooming with one or two soft pink flowers, tiny sparkle accents inside object bounds, transparent background.
Small clover sprout with two rounded leaves, premium cozy 2D/2.5D plant prop, transparent background.
Lush clover leaf plant with vertical rounded foliage, soft sunlight, grounded contact shadow, transparent background.
Same clover plant with tiny white-pink blossoms and gentle sparkle accents, transparent background.
Small spring flower patch sprout cluster, low ground-hugging shape, soft 2D/2.5D cozy garden prop, transparent background.
Fuller spring flower patch with leafy green mound but few buds, same footprint and contact shadow, transparent background.
Spring flower patch fully blooming with small pastel blossoms, premium soft mobile game prop, transparent background.
